response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic tooling) at re:cinq, but falls well short of the Principal/Director-level IC bar. The role demands 15 years of engineering with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption — none of which are evidenced. Career trajectory is senior IC, not principal/staff-level strategic leadership, and cloud-platform depth (hyperscaler architecture, large-scale AI systems) is thin.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic frameworks
Founder of an open-source geospatial platform showing entrepreneurial initiative and long-term ownership
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at the scale the role requires
Roughly 14 years of professional experience and no Principal/Director-level IC track record
Limited evidence of deep cloud-platform strategy or advising strategic enterprise customers

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI platforms
Seniority gap vs. Principal/Director IC bar
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure
